description: Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Add schema for workspace members and audit log
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a schema for workspace members (with roles) and an audit log table to record membership changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace members table tracks user, workspace, and role

userStories.title: Add backend action to invite members
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a backend action to invite a member by email and record it in the audit log.

userStories.title: Add UI form to invite workspace members
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite members by email from the workspace settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page includes an invite form
Submitting the form invites the member via the backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to change member roles
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a backend action to update a member's role (viewer, editor, admin) and record it in the audit log.

userStories.title: Add UI control to change member roles
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, and admin in the member list.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can change the role via a UI control
Role changes are saved via the backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to revoke access
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a backend action to remove a member from the workspace and record it in the audit log.

userStories.title: Add UI control to revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke a user's access from the workspace member list.
acceptanceCriteria: Member list includes a revoke access button
Clicking the button calls the backend to remove the member
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add UI to review membership audit log
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see a log of membership changes in the workspace settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page includes an audit log section
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
